---
title: "Pairwise correlations of omics measurements"
output: html_document
params:
  isa_file: C:/Users/Casper.deVisser/Documents/ipsc-data-analysis/20240822_Xomics_iPSC_Neurons_new_READ-ONLY.xlsx
  mae_hdf5_path: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_MAE/h5MAE
  outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/results/RLM/
---

## Params
The `MultiAssayExperiment` [@Ramos2017] contains preprocessed data and has been created with the *R* notebook `examples\create_MultiAssayExperiment.Rmd`.

```{r read_multiassayexperiment}
print(params)
outdir <- params$outdir
```


## Read data and metadata: MultiAssayExperiment

```{r}
require(SummarizedExperiment)
suppressWarnings(library(MultiAssayExperiment)) 


mae <- loadHDF5MultiAssayExperiment(
  dir = params$mae_hdf5_path, 
  prefix = 'mae')
experiments(mae)
```

## RNAseq and Proteomics data
```{r}
get_data <- function(name_assay) {
  se <- mae[[name_assay]]
  df_wide <- data.frame(t(assay(se)))
  return(df_wide)
}

get_feature_metadata <- function(name_assay) {
  se <- mae[[name_assay]]
  df_wide <- as.data.frame(rowData(se))
  return(df_wide)
}

RNAseq <- get_data('RNAseq | Deseq')
Proteomics <- get_data('Proteomics')

RNAseq_features <- get_feature_metadata('RNAseq | Deseq')
Proteomics_features <- get_feature_metadata('Proteomics')
```


## Intersection based on gene ids
```{r}
common_genes <- intersect(RNAseq_features$Gene_symbol, Proteomics_features$gene_id)

RNAseq_features_common <- RNAseq_features[RNAseq_features$Gene_symbol %in% common_genes,]
Proteomics_features_common <- Proteomics_features[Proteomics_features$gene_id %in% common_genes,]

RNAseq_common <- RNAseq[,colnames(RNAseq) %in% rownames(RNAseq_features_common)]
Proteomics_common <- Proteomics[,colnames(Proteomics) %in% rownames(Proteomics_features_common)]

## Put in same order
colnames(RNAseq_common) <- RNAseq_features_common$Gene_symbol 
colnames(Proteomics_common) <- Proteomics_features_common$gene_id 

Proteomics_common_sorted <- Proteomics_common[ match(colnames(RNAseq_common), colnames(Proteomics_common))]

## Same set of samples
Proteomics_common_sorted <- Proteomics_common_sorted[rownames(RNAseq_common),]
```

## Pairwise correlations of shared genes
```{r}
correlations <- sapply(names(RNAseq_common), function(col) cor(RNAseq_common[[col]], Proteomics_common_sorted[[col]]))
mean(correlations)
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)

ggplot(data.frame(cor = correlations), aes(x = cor)) +
   geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05, fill = "skyblue1", color = "black")
```
